headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://api.anthropic.com https://*.openstreetmap.org; frame-ancestors 'none';
